name: SoCo Creamery
description: House-made ice cream shop in downtown Great Barrington offering rotating flavors from local ingredients.

evidence.detail: Repeatedly listed among top ice cream destinations in the region

photoBriefs.searchQuery: SoCo Creamery Great Barrington ice cream cone scoop photo
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Close-up of two scoops of ice cream in a cone with visible flavor texture and toppings
photoBriefs.suggestedSource: X post by local visitors showing plated scoops 2023-2024

photoBriefs.searchQuery: SoCo Creamery Great Barrington flavor of the day sundae
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Plated sundae with specific house-made flavor and sauce drizzle

name: High Lawn Farm
description: Historic working dairy farm producing and selling its own ice cream on-site from farm milk.

evidence.detail: Covered in multiple state agritourism and travel articles

photoBriefs.searchQuery: High Lawn Farm Lee MA ice cream cone farm milk
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Scoops of vanilla or chocolate ice cream in cone with farm backdrop visible but focused on product
photoBriefs.suggestedSource: X post by @berkshiresvisitor showing dish summer 2023

name: Chocolate Springs Cafe
description: Specialty chocolate shop producing house-made gelato and ice cream in Lenox.

evidence.detail: Regularly featured in Lenox food coverage

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Chocolate Springs Cafe Lenox gelato scoop close up
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Tight crop on single scoop of gelato showing texture and color

name: Taft Farms Ice Cream Stand
description: Longstanding farm stand serving fresh ice cream made with local ingredients.

evidence.detail: Mentioned in multiple visitor reports and farm stand listings

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Taft Farms ice cream stand Great Barrington cone
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Ice cream cone with farm-fresh scoop detail

name: Bartlett's Orchard Ice Cream
description: Family orchard with dedicated ice cream shop using orchard produce in flavors.

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Bartletts Orchard Richmond MA ice cream
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Plated ice cream with visible fruit pieces from orchard

name: Windy Hill Farm
description: Orchard and farm stand serving soft-serve ice cream.

evidence.detail: Noted in multiple local farm stand references

photoBriefs.searchQuery: Windy Hill Farm Great Barrington soft serve cone
photoBriefs.expectedVisual: Swirl of soft-serve ice cream in cone with orchard fruit accents
